channel.title: Enterprise AI on Karan Raj Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise AI on Karan Raj Sharma

item.title: What Recent Agentic AI Research (2025–2026) Reveals About the Future of Autonomous Systems
item.description: This article reviews six recent papers from the emerging field of agentic AI research (2025–2026) and distills the key technical and governance insights shaping the next generation of autonomous AI systems.

item.title: How AI Is Disrupting Project Management?
item.description: Discover how AI is transforming project management with predictive analytics, automation, and intelligent resource allocation. Top AI tools for 2025.
